summary: The mother is at risk due to threatened miscarriage and gestational diabetes; explaining these conditions clearly will help her make an informed choice about whether or not to proceed with a medically induced abortion while discussing potential complications and other available procedures like continued monitoring without intervention if feasible under current circumstances given no severe fetal anomalies were noted during ultrasounds performed thus far which would necessitate immediate action rather than waiting until viability as per state laws allowing such interventions up
